- "fuzzy": Retrieves items by overlap between their label words and the query keywords. The query keywords must not match label words exactly, but some fuzziness is allowed. - The **Imam Reza Shrine** in Mashhad, Iran, is one of the largest mosques in the world.
- The mosque complex can accommodate **up to 100,000 to 150,000 worshippers** during large religious gatherings.

Therefore, even though the exact capacity is not explicitly stored in Wikidata, it is a well-known fact that the capacity of the Imam Reza Shrine (as a religious complex containing the mausoleum of Imam Reza) is approximately **100,000 to 150,000 people**.
